name: RideNow Powersports Surprise

inventorySample.label: Can-Am Maverick X3 RS Turbo R

signals: Part of the largest powersports dealer group in the US (RumbleOn / RideNow network)
Standardized digital storefront across 50+ locations, but inventory ops are run locally
High public-company scrutiny on per-store gross profit and inventory days-on-lot
Phoenix metro is one of the strongest year-round powersports markets in the country
Recent corporate restructuring at RumbleOn parent signals appetite for ops tooling
aboutCopy: RideNow Surprise is one of the largest powersports dealerships in Arizona, operating as part of the RideNow network. We carry Yamaha, Kawasaki, Suzuki, Honda, Polaris, Can-Am, Aprilia, and Vespa under one roof, with a full service center and finance team on-site seven days a week.
